data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for last-touch/first-touch policy fields.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of last-touch/first-touch policy fields, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or validation of these fields. The linked use case mentions the need for these fields, but the prior steps do not include any evidence related to their creation or validation. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: Last-touch/first-touch policy fields are not present.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of last-touch/first-touch policy fields.
